title: Add a way to stop getting notifications for things you are no longer working on
excerpt: Can you add an option to stop getting notifications for line items that you used to work on.  Currently if you were ever tagged or added in a person column on a line item you will continue to get notifications after you …

posts.author: MarkN (Mark Nuara)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you add an option to stop getting notifications for line items that you used to work on. Currently if you were ever tagged or added in a person column on a line item you will continue to get notifications after you are no longer tagged on that item.
